title: Mounting the force transducer
description:
Mounting the force transducer

Mounting the force transducer

The Force Sensing option comes with an end effector mounting flange for your robot model that the force sensor is mounted to.

To mount the force transducer to the robot:

Remove the top cover of the transducer.

Remove the robot's end effector axis coupling and mount it to the transducer cover.

Install the transducer cover / coupling assembly onto the transducer.

Mount the end effector flange to the bottom side of the transducer.

Install the entire assembly on the end effector axis.

The following figures show mounting for gamma and nano transducers.

Mounting the Gamma Force Sensor

Mounting the Nano Force Sensor
